title: First Enchantment
description: As an Apprentice, you're ready to learn the art of enchantment. Senior Mage Aldric needs assistance with a complex enchanting ritual. Gather the necessary components and follow his precise instructions to create your first enchanted item - a ring of minor protection.

objectives.description: Speak with Senior Mage Aldric about the enchantment
Acquire a silver ingot from a blacksmith
objectives.notes: Can be purchased from blacksmith in Dalhurst or Thornfield
Available from magic shops or dropped by magical creatures

objectives.description: Assist Aldric with the enchanting ritual
Report the successful enchantment to Archmage Elara

notes: First Apprentice quest. Introduces enchanting mechanic. Rewards enchanted ring (+2 armor).
